description: A single item in the sbean registry. Represents a component, style, utility, or theme.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for this item.

name.description: The name of the item. Unique within the registry. This is the identifier used by `sbean add <name>`.

type.description: The item type. Determines the target directory and how the item is resolved in the user's project.

title.description: A human-readable title. Keep it short and descriptive.

author.description: The author of the item. Recommended format: username <url>

description.description: A brief description of the item. Shown in search results.

extends.description: Name of a parent registry item this item extends.

dependencies.description: NPM packages required by this item. Installed when the item is added.

devDependencies.description: NPM devDependencies required by this item.

registryDependencies.description: Other registry items this item depends on. Will be resolved and added together.

files.description: The source files that make up this item. Each file object describes a file path, its type, and optional target.

path.description: Path to the file, relative to the registry root. During build, the file content is read and inlined.

content.description: The file content. Populated by `sbean build`. Empty in source registry.json.

type.description: The file type. Determines where it's placed in the user's project.

target.description: Optional explicit target path. Overrides the default placement based on file type.

cssVars.description: CSS custom properties defined by this item.

light.description: CSS variables for light mode. Keys are variable names, values are CSS values.

css.description: A CSS string to append to the user's stylesheet.

meta.description: Arbitrary metadata attached to this item.

docs.description: URL to the documentation page for this item.

font.description: Font configuration. Only used when type is `registry:font`.

src.description: Font source URL or import statement.

config.description: Base configuration. Only used when type is `registry:base`.
